institution.vision: National Level Excellence and International Visibility in Every Facet of Engineering Research and Education.
mission: To facilitate quality transformative education in Engineering and Management.
To foster innovations in Technology and its application for meeting global challenges.
To pursue and disseminate Quality Research.
To equip, enrich and transform students to be Responsible Professionals for better service to humanity.
accreditation: All B. Tech Programs are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation till 31-12-2028.
M. Tech Courses are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation.

contacts.name: College Address
contacts.address: College of Engineering Trivandrum, Engineering College P.O, Sreekaryam, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, PIN 695016

facilities.name: Central Computing Facility
facilities.summary: Shared computing hub with server room, three labs, high-end servers, 200+ computers, printers, scanners, projectors and 1Gbps NKN connectivity.
facilities.hours: 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM on working days

facilities.name: Central Technical Library
facilities.summary: Campus library and reading reference point for freshers.

facilities.name: Civil Engineering Laboratories
facilities.summary: Includes soil mechanics, highway, traffic, strength of materials, survey, environmental, structural, hydraulics, coastal, hydroinformatics, concrete and transportation research facilities.

facilities.name: Center for Sustainable Development
facilities.summary: CET centre focused on sustainable development goals, research collaboration and industry uptake.

locations.name: CET Campus Reference Point
locations.note: Official campus reference point for College of Engineering Trivandrum, Sreekaryam.

locations.name: Administrative Building / Main Block
locations.note: Main office and principal office zone for certificates, visitor help and first-day reporting.

locations.name: Central Computing Facility
locations.note: CCF: server room, labs and shared computing resources. Verify exact entrance locally.

locations.name: Department of Civil Engineering
locations.note: Civil Engineering block and lab zone.

locations.name: Men's Hostel
locations.note: Men's hostel area. Use hostel office/security contacts for urgent needs.

locations.name: Ladies Hostel
locations.note: Ladies hostel main area. Use LH security and matron contacts for urgent needs.
